problem id: 9124295a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10000110 -> 10011111
  01001110 -> 10101100
  11000110 -> 10001111
  11000100 -> 01001111
  00101001 -> 10010101
  01011010 -> 00101001
  10110011 -> 01110011
  11001100 -> 01001101

query: 10101100
predicted answer: 01010101
